did_you_know.title: Did you know?
did_you_know.stat1: 1 in 3 women and 1 in 5 men over 50 will suffer an osteoporotic fracture.
did_you_know.stat2: 8.9 million fractures occur annually — one every 3 seconds.

hero.description: Ósseo+ was born from the need to offer a scientific and technological solution for the preservation of autonomy and vitality throughout life.

item1.description: Founded with a focus on clinical physiology and biomechanics.

item2.description: Integration of advanced osteogenic loading protocols.

item3.description: National reference in longevity and skeletal health.

specialist.name: Dr. Andrew P. Hatch
specialist.bio_p1: With over 30 years of experience in chiropractic care, I've dedicated my career to understanding and treating musculoskeletal challenges across all age groups. Having treated more than 20,000 patients, my focus has been on conditions such as neck and back pain, herniated discs, migraines, dizziness, poor posture, and degenerative spine disorders.
specialist.bio_p2: Recognizing the evolving needs of our aging population, I founded Ósseo+ to address and prevent conditions like sarcopenia and osteoporosis. Our mission is to promote healthy aging by enhancing muscle strength, bone density, and reducing the risk of falls, fractures, and metabolic complications.
specialist.bio_p4: I'm actively seeking collaborations with medical researchers to validate and expand upon our methodologies at Ósseo+. Additionally, I'm building a referral network within the Portuguese medical community to foster interdisciplinary approaches to patient care.

hero.title_base: Science and Technology at the service of your
hero.description: Our method integrates the three fundamental pillars of human physical integrity: Bone, Strength, and Balance.

tech.item4_desc: Detailed analysis of lean mass and density.

science.title: Our Science
science.subtitle: Scientific foundation behind the Ósseo+ method.

wolff_law.title: Wolff's Law
wolff_law.desc: Bone architecture and density adapt to the mechanical stress applied to it. Bone is a dynamic tissue that responds to stimulus.

osteogenic.title: Osteogenic Loading
osteogenic.desc: The most effective method for stimulating the formation of new bone tissue, far exceeding low-impact activities like walking or vibration.

longevity.title: Organ of Longevity
longevity.desc: Muscle plays a critical role in metabolic health and the preservation of bone density over the years.

athletes_promo.title: Elite Performance Analysis
athletes_promo.description: Unlock your maximum potential with our dedicated precision system for high-performance athletes.

plans.hero_subtitle: Personalized plans designed for your specific needs and health goals.

p1.title: 1st Evaluation
p1.subtitle: The First Step to Your Well-Being
p1.desc: At Ósseo+, we know that every body is unique and deserves specialized attention. Our 1.ª Evaluation allows us to understand your condition, identify possible imbalances and define the best plan to relieve muscular, bone or joint pain.
p1.price_info: For new clients, this evaluation has a cost of 55€. However, for those who are already clients of Global Wellness, the service is free.
p1.footer: Prioritize your health. Book your evaluation now and start the path to a pain-free life!

p2.title: Balance Therapy
p2.subtitle: Take Full Care of Your Body
p2.desc: Balance Therapy was developed to help restore well-being, relieve muscle and joint pain, and improve your quality of life. With personalized support, this approach promotes body alignment and effective relief of discomfort.
p2.footer: Invest in your health and well-being with continuous and effective treatment. Book your sessions now and feel the difference!

p3.title: Ósseo + Balance Therapy
p3.subtitle: The Best Care for Your Body
p3.desc: Ósseo + Balance Therapy combines specialized techniques to restore body balance, relieve bone and muscle pain, and promote global well-being. With continuous monitoring, this therapy helps improve mobility, reduce discomfort and prevent future complications.
p3.footer: Give your body the care it deserves. Book your sessions now and recover your well-being!

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.subtitle: Find quick answers to the most common questions about our method.
faq.q1: Is training safe for people with osteoporosis?
faq.a1: Yes, it is extremely safe. Our method was designed precisely to stimulate the bone in a controlled way, without the impact or risk of conventional physical activities.
faq.a2: Sessions are short and efficient, lasting between 15 to 20 minutes. The focus is on the intensity and quality of the stimulus, not the duration.
faq.a3: For most bone health protocols, one weekly session is sufficient to generate the necessary stimuli for skeletal remineralization.
faq.q4: Do I need to wear gym clothes?
faq.a4: You can come in your normal everyday clothes, as long as they are comfortable. Since we don't sweat significantly during the stimulus, sports clothing is not mandatory.

footer.about_desc: Dedicated to transforming lives through bone health and biomechanics. Elite technology for your well-being.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: Please read carefully the terms and conditions of use for our website and services.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using the Ósseo+ website, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions of use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our website.

services.title: Description of Services
services.content: Ósseo+ provides information on bone health and biomechanical training services. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of our services at any time.

medical.title: Medical Disclaimer
medical.content: The content of this website is intended for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition.

User_responsibilities.title: User Responsibilities
User_responsibilities.content: You agree to use the website only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of, restrict or inhibit anyone else's use and enjoyment of the website.

intellectual_property.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual_property.content: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and images, is the property of Ósseo+ or its content suppliers and is protected by copyright laws.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: Ósseo+ reserves the right to change these terms at any time. Your continued use of the website following such changes will constitute your acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For any questions regarding these terms, please contact us at ola@osseo.pt.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your data.

collection.title: Data Collection
collection.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you fill out a contact form or subscribe to our newsletter. This data may include your name, email address, and phone number.

usage.title: Use of Information
usage.content: We use the collected information to provide, maintain and improve our services, respond to your requests, and send relevant communications about Ósseo+.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience and analyze website traffic. You can control the use of cookies through your browser settings.

sharing.title: Data Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties without your consent, except when necessary to provide our services or comply with the law.

security.title: Security
security.content: We implement security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, port and delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, please contact us.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at ola@osseo.pt.

cookies.title: We use Cookies
cookies.description: This site uses cookies to ensure you get the best experience on our platform.

hero.title: Measure. Performance. Improve. Perform.
hero.subtitle: Ósseo+ Performance is a precision-based strength and performance system designed for athletes who want measurable results—not guesswork.
hero.description: Ósseo+ Performance is a precision-based strength and performance system designed for athletes who want measurable results—not guesswork.

intro.title: Precision over
intro.text: Using advanced isometric technology, we assess your maximum force output and track your neuromuscular performance over time. This allows you to train smarter, monitor progress objectively, and enhance both performance and resilience.

assessment.title: Initial Performance Assessment
assessment.subtitle: Your starting point for measurable improvement.
assessment.benefit1: Establish your baseline strength profile and identify performance gaps
assessment.benefit2: Receive a detailed performance report with your results and key insights

sessions.title: Ongoing Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Reassess, train, and track your evolution.
sessions.item2: Objective monitoring of evolution over time
sessions.item3: Performance report after every session to track gains and trends
sessions.freq1: Weekly (optimal for performance and bone density)

why.title: Why Athletes Choose Ósseo+ Performance
why.item2: Improve load capacity and training resilience
why.item4: Promote bone density (essential for athletic longevity)
why.item5: Track real results with objective data and performance reports

edge.text: Train with precision. Measure what matters. Elevate your performance.
edge.desc: High performance is not just about how strong you are, but about how well you recover and maintain symmetry.

performance.cta_text: Ready to replace guesswork with high-precision data? Join the performance elite.

expert.title: Meet
expert.subtitle: Founder & Clinical Director
expert.description: With over 30 years of clinical experience and 20,000 patients treated, Dr. Andrew Hatch founded Ósseo+ to integrate precision biomechanics and longevity physiology. His mission is to transform data into results, allowing every athlete — professional or recreational — to reach their maximum potential safely and scientifically.
